---
id: get-report
title: 'Get report'
description: ''
sidebar_label: 'Get report'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'get api-method'
info_path: theolive/api/reports/reports
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Get report'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'get'} path={'/{id}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails parameters={[{ name: 'id', in: 'path', description: 'ID of report', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true }]}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    '200': {
      description: '200',
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          examples: {
            Result: {
              value:
                '{\n  "reportId": "id-of-report",\n    "channelIds": [\n        "channel-id"\n    ],\n    "end": "end-datetime",\n    "name": "name-report",\n    "start": "start-datetime",\n    "reportUrl": "url"\n}',
            },
          },
          schema: {
            type: 'object',
            properties: {
              reportId: { type: 'string', example: 'id-of-report' },
              channelIds: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', example: 'channel-id' } },
              end: { type: 'string', example: 'end-datetime' },
              name: { type: 'string', example: 'name-report' },
              start: { type: 'string', example: 'start-datetime' },
              reportUrl: { type: 'string', example: 'url' },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    '400': {
      description: '400',
      content: { 'application/json': { examples: { Result: { value: '{}' } }, schema: { type: 'object', properties: {} } } },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
